---
title: "Data Storytelling"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
---
Data storytelling combines analysis and communication to turn data into meaningful narratives. In these projects, I focus on presenting insights clearly through visualizations and structured storytelling to support decision-making.


## My Approach to Data Storytelling

- Framing problems in a real-world context
- Using visuals to highlight key insights
- Simplifying complex data into clear messages
- Structuring analysis as a narrative
- Providing actionable recommendations



## Projects

**Overview**  
Analyzed data to tell a clear, actionable story.

**What I Did:**  
- Explored trends and patterns in the dataset  
- Highlighted key insights visually  
- Summarized findings into a clear narrative  

**Tools:** 
Python (Polars)  

[You can view the full projects on the sidebar to your left]
